title: dactylorhiza × thellungiana
intro: Dactylorhiza × thellungiana, also known as the hybrid orchid, is a rare cross between Dactylorhiza hatagirea and Coeloglossum viride, resulting in a unique orchid species. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza × thellungiana include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce swelling, fight off infections, and promote overall well-being. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can also be found in some modern herbal supplements and remedies.
